summary: The diff implements both REQ-1 (restoring the Version 9 frontend with all sections) and REQ-2 (replacing the CETA Galaxy logo with the Version 16 asset in Navigation.tsx, HeroSection.tsx, and Footer.tsx). All required page sections are present in App.tsx and their respective component files. The Version 16 CETA Galaxy logo path (/assets/generated/ceta-galaxy-logo.dim_512x512.png) is used in all three specified files, while the HOPE logo (/assets/HOPE Logo_0-Photoroom-1.png) remains unchanged. No backend logic or data model changes are detected. The implementation appears complete and consistent with the build request.
